Articles.Title: No SWIFT, No Dollar: Ruble–Yuan System Paves Way for Multipolar Finance
Articles.Description: Nearly 100% of Russia-China trade is now settled in national currencies, which is a landmark in financial sovereignty, Hong Kong-based political analyst Angelo Giuliano tells Sputnik.
